a: What's the toy you were most obsessed with as a kid?
b: What childhood possession do you remember most vividly?

a: What TV show did you watch religiously as a child?
b: What kids' show do you know every theme song to?

a: What did you want to be when you grew up at age seven?
b: What was your first serious answer when adults asked what you'd be?

a: What's a game you played at school that kids today have probably never heard of?
b: What playground game from your childhood has probably died out?

a: What's a food from your childhood you still crave?
b: What snack or meal from when you were young do you still hunt for?

a: What's your earliest memory?
b: What's the furthest back you can actually remember?

a: What did you spend most of your free time doing at age ten?
b: What was your go-to activity on a free afternoon as a kid?

a: What's a piece of technology from your childhood that felt magical?
b: What gadget or device from when you were young seemed impossibly cool?

a: What was your favourite subject in primary school?
b: What class did you genuinely look forward to as a young kid?

a: What's a movie from your childhood you'd still watch today?
b: What kids' film have you actually rewatched as an adult?

a: What's something you were scared of as a kid that now seems ridiculous?
b: What childhood fear seems completely irrational looking back?

a: What did your family do every summer without fail?
b: What was the most consistent summer tradition in your house?

a: What's a song that takes you back to a specific moment in childhood?
b: What track instantly transports you to being young?

a: What was the first concert or live event you ever went to?
b: What's the first time you saw live performance of any kind?

a: What's a book you read as a kid that genuinely shaped you?
b: What children's or young adult book had a real impact on how you think?

a: What was your favourite thing to do on a rainy day as a child?
b: What was your indoor fallback activity when you were stuck inside as a kid?

a: What teacher do you still think about?
b: Which teacher from school made the biggest impression on you?

a: What's the holiday memory you keep coming back to?
b: What specific moment from a holiday or vacation has really stayed with you?

a: What was the first album or CD you actually owned?
b: What was the earliest music you remember being obsessed with?

a: What was your biggest achievement before the age of twelve?
b: What are you most proud of from when you were a young kid?

a: What's something you got in trouble for as a kid?
b: What do you remember being punished for when you were young?

a: What's a hobby or activity you dropped as a teenager that you kind of miss?
b: What did you stop doing as you grew up that you sometimes wish you hadn't?

a: What did you spend your pocket money on?
b: What did you always buy when you had money as a child?

a: What's a family tradition from childhood that you still keep?
b: What ritual from growing up have you carried into adult life?

a: What was your relationship with your siblings or closest friends like at age ten?
b: How would you describe your childhood friendships or sibling bond?

a: What TV advertisement from your childhood do you still remember word for word?
b: What childhood commercial jingle is permanently lodged in your memory?

a: What's the first time you felt genuinely embarrassed in public?
b: What's your most cringe-inducing childhood memory?

a: What phase did you go through as a teenager that you now find hilarious?
b: What teenage identity or obsession makes you laugh now?

a: What's a smell that instantly takes you back to childhood?
b: What scent do you associate strongly with growing up?

a: What was your first phone like?
b: What's your earliest mobile phone memory?
